prompt: A cinematic anime-style movie poster featuring an {argument name="character description" default="anime girl with short blue hair, blue cat ears, and a fluffy blue cat tail, wearing an oversized white t-shirt"}. She is standing on a wet, reflective outdoor train station platform at twilight, looking back over her shoulder with a gentle, melancholic expression. The background features a beautifully detailed sky transitioning from deep blue to orange and pink, with scattered clouds and early stars. To the left is an illuminated vending machine and an overhead electronic sign displaying Japanese text about the terminal station. To the right, train tracks curve away into the distance alongside rusty metal railings and a convex mirror. The lighting is atmospheric and nostalgic. At the top center, small elegant Japanese text reads "{argument name="top tagline" default="終点のひとつ手前で、ソーダさんはいつも笑う。"}". At the bottom, large elegant Japanese typography displays the main title "{argument name="main title text" default="終点からソーダさん"}", with the English subtitle "{argument name="english subtitle" default="FROM THE TERMINAL, SODA-SAN"}" just below it. At the very bottom edge, small Japanese text reads "{argument name="bottom tagline" default="たぶん恋ではなく、もう少し炭酸だった。"}".
translatedPrompt: 一张动漫风格的电影海报，画面主体为 {argument name="character appearance" default="一位留着蓝色短发、长着蓝色兽耳、拖着蓬松蓝色尾巴，身穿超大号白色 T 恤的少女"}。她站在湿润且带有倒影的日本乡村火车站台上，正处于黄昏时分，回眸望向镜头，神情平静温柔。背景是令人惊叹的黄昏天空，色彩从深蓝色过渡到鲜艳的橙色和粉色，点缀着初现的星辰和富有质感的云朵。车站设施包括左侧发光的自动售货机、右侧斑驳的木质长椅、延伸至远方的铁轨、头顶的站牌以及一面圆形安全镜。灯光氛围浓郁，车站灯光的暖色调与清冷的黄昏形成鲜明对比。海报顶部印有优雅的小字："{argument name="top quote" default="終点のひとつ手前で、ソーダさんはいつも笑う。"}"。海报下三分之一处，醒目的大号字体展示主标题："{argument name="main title" default="終点からソーダさん"}"，下方配有较小的英文副标题："{argument name="english subtitle" default="FROM THE TERMINAL, SODA-SAN"}"。最底部边缘印有一行文字："{argument name="bottom quote" default="たぶん恋ではなく、もう少し炭酸だった。"}"。整体氛围怀旧、略带忧郁，且细节极其丰富。

breakdown.creativeCore: 电影感动漫风火车站海报：生成一张细节丰富、氛围感十足的动漫电影海报，画面主体为黄昏火车站中的角色，并支持自定义排版文字。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.bestUse: 电影海报、音乐封面、书籍封面、播客封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: cinematic, anime]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
